title: Never Enough Discs
description: This Modpack add over 100+ music discs with mods being developed right now to add even more!
body:
![The title of the mod and the creator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d6710ed97141508b40f719797a8525b8632711.png)

____________________________________________________________________________________________________

  This Modpack aims to make the focus of the game one simple thing - Discs. There is currently over 100+ discs in the modpack. This may seem like a lot but we are hard at work making new mods to increase that amount significantly. The music disc mods in the modpack are [More Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-music-discs). Also if anyone asks this is the too much QoL Mod.

Special Thanks to MarsThePlanet for creating the More Music Discs Mod

Currently all the discs:

 ![An image showing all of the currently obtainable discs in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77621fce731702619e1929eb50c5c055cf1d8668.webp)
